rules.name: Energy Matching
rules.description: Assign deep work to peak energy hours and shallow tasks to low-energy windows.

rules.name: Priority Pyramid
rules.description: Start with one high-impact task then medium tasks before admin work.

rules.name: Interleaving
rules.description: Alternate cognitive load categories to reduce fatigue and increase retention.

rules.name: Break Hygiene
rules.description: Take short movement and hydration breaks after each focus session.
